info.name: Regression - STAGE
info.description:
Release 9.6 STAGE regression — one collection, split by **module**.

## Modules
1. **CNP** — Card Not Present (17 Testmo cases)
2. **TokenVault** — TokenVault folder (13 Testmo cases)

## How to run
- Import env: prefer module env, or use values from `9.6-Regression-STAGE.postman_environment.json`.
- Inside each module: run that module’s **00. Auth** first, then TC folders in order.

## TokenVault / CP note
CP cases (cardToken GUID) need **QA lead support** (physical lane). Simulator laneId 9999 is not enough for TokenVault ACs. Requests are kept PARKED.

## Refs
- CNP cards: `CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md`
- TokenVault cases: `tokenvault/CASE-REVIEW.md`

item.name: CNP
item.description:
Card Not Present (CNP) — Testmo folder Card Not Present (CNP).
Run 00. Auth in this module first. See CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md for Pay Page / CVV-ZIP PANs.

item.name: 00. Auth — Payments (run first in this module)
item.description: Setup — not a Testmo case. Saves Payment-Bearer-Token.

item.name: POST Authenticate Payment (STAGE)

request.description: Auth hardcoded STAGE: WellfitUnifiedPaymentsAPI. Select env **Regression STAGE** (URL + other vars).

item.name: TC01. Validate that, CNP can process successful transactions with VISA Card.
item.description:
AC-1 / Case 13579. process-card with numeric ProcessorToken from TokenVault.dbo.PaymentTokens (VISA), network VI, Redhill subMerchantId.

**Expect:** 200, transactionId, approvalNumber, billingDescriptor, token/expirationDate.
**Evidence:** Postman body. Saves lastTransactionId for TC08/TC09.

item.name: POST process-card — VISA Card

request.description:
AC-1 / Case 13579. process-card with numeric ProcessorToken from TokenVault.dbo.PaymentTokens (VISA), network VI, Redhill subMerchantId.

**Expect:** 200, transactionId, approvalNumber, billingDescriptor, token/expirationDate.
**Evidence:** Postman body. Saves lastTransactionId for TC08/TC09.

item.name: TC05. Validate that, CNP receives an error message when the CVV does not match.
item.description:
AC-5 / Case 13583. Confluence Vantiv cards (see CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md).

**Do not use ProcessorToken** — token rail ignores CVV.

1) eProtect Visa `4457010000000009` + wrong CVV `000` → expect eProtect reject.
2) eProtect Amex `374313304211118` → process-card → expect CVV/CID decline.

item.name: POST eProtect — Visa AVS card wrong CVV (445701…0009)

request.description:
Confluence: 4457010000000009 Visa CVV 349 ZIP 01803 — use for CVV/ZIP/AVS.
This request sends **wrong CVV 000** (correct is 349).
**Expect:** eProtect not Success — often codes 881–883 (CVV) or no paypageRegistrationId / Failure.
If you somehow get registrationId, do **not** treat as TC05 pass; use the Amex CVV-fail path below.

exec: let j = {}; try { j = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
pm.test('CVV rejected at eProtect (no Success registration) OR CVV error code', () => {
console.warn('eProtect accepted wrong CVV — use Amex 374313… path for TC05');

item.name: POST eProtect — Amex Decline CVV/CID (374313304211118)

request.description:
Confluence: 374313304211118 Amex — Decline CVV/CID Fail.
Then run process-card in this folder. Expect CVV/CID decline (not 200 approval).

item.name: POST process-card — Amex CVV/CID fail card

request.description:
After eProtect Amex 374313304211118. Confluence: Decline CVV/CID Fail.
**Expect:** not approved (4xx or decline without normal approvalNumber success).

exec: if (!reg) { throw new Error('paypageRegistrationId empty — run eProtect in this folder first'); }
// 200 with transactionId+approval = fail this negative case
pm.expect(softApproved, 'Got approval — wrong Confluence PAN or path').to.be.false;
pm.test('Error/decline mentions expected signal when possible', () => {
if (!ok) console.warn('Check body manually against Confluence expected decline');

item.name: TC06. Validate that, CNP receives an error message when the Zipcode does not match.
item.description:
AC-6 / Case 13584. Confluence: MasterCard `5112000200000002` = Billing Zip Code mismatch.
Alt: Visa `4457010000000009` (CVV 349 / ZIP 01803) + process-card zipCode 00000.
See CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md. Do not use generic ProcessorToken.

item.name: POST eProtect — MC Billing ZIP mismatch card (5112000200000002)

request.description:
Confluence: 5112000200000002 MasterCard — Billing Zip Code mismatch.
Then process-card below.

item.name: POST eProtect — Visa AVS card correct CVV (445701…0009) optional alt

request.description: Optional alt: Confluence AVS card. Use CVV 349, then process-card with zipCode 00000.

item.name: POST process-card — MC 511200…0002 (Billing Zip mismatch)

request.description:
After eProtect 5112000200000002 (primary) or AVS Visa + set zipCode 00000 in body.
**Expect:** ~409 ProcessorResponse.Failure.ZipCode / Billing Zip Code Mismatch.

exec: if (!reg) { throw new Error('paypageRegistrationId empty — run eProtect in this folder first'); }
if (code !== 409) console.warn('Expected 409 Billing Zip Code Mismatch when Confluence PAN works');

item.name: POST process-card — AVS Visa wrong zip 00000 (optional alt)

request.description:
After optional eProtect 4457010000000009 (CVV 349). zipCode 00000 vs Confluence 01803.
Expect ~409 Billing Zip Code Mismatch.

exec: if (!pm.environment.get('paypageRegistrationId')) throw new Error('Run Visa AVS eProtect first');

exec: if (!reg) { throw new Error('paypageRegistrationId empty — run eProtect in this folder first'); }
// 200 with transactionId+approval = fail this negative case
pm.expect(softApproved, 'Got approval — wrong Confluence PAN or path').to.be.false;
pm.test('Error/decline mentions expected signal when possible', () => {
if (!ok) console.warn('Check body manually against Confluence expected decline');

item.name: TC08. Validate that, the correct Transaction Amount is stored in the [Payments].[Payments] DB table.
item.description:
AC-8 / Case 13586. After successful process-card, Platform [Payments].[Payments].Amount matches request amount.
Use lastTransactionId from TC01–TC04 (or seed request in this folder).

item.name: POST process-card — seed amount (optional if TC01 already run)

request.description: Optional seed. Prefer reusing lastTransactionId from TC01 if amount known.

item.name: SQL — Amount (Send → Visualize → Platform)

request.description:
Testmo AC-8. Send → Visualize → copy SQL → Azure Data Studio (**Platform**).
Expect Amount = lastAmount for lastTransactionId.

exec: pm.test('lastTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API step first'));
pm.test('txn id ready for SQL', () => pm.expect(id).to.be.ok);

`

Copy this SQL → Azure Data Studio (Platform DB)

` +

item.name: TC09. Validate that, the correct PaymenTypeMethod is stored for the new payment transaction in the [Payments].[Payments] DB table
item.description:
AC-9 / Case 13588. After token process-card, PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (CNP token).
After Pay Page (TC14–17), re-check → PaymentTypeMethod = 1.
Mapping: 0 eCheck, 1 Pay Page, 2 CNP token, 3 Apple Pay, 4 Google Pay, 5 CP.

item.name: SQL — PaymentTypeMethod (Send → Visualize → Platform)

request.description:
Testmo AC-9. Send → Visualize → copy SQL → **Platform**.
Token sale → PaymentTypeMethod = 2. Pay Page → 1.

body.raw:
SELECT Id, TransactionId, Amount, PaymentTypeMethod, OrderId, TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Payments]
WHERE TransactionId = '{{lastTransactionId}}';
-- Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (token) or 1 (Pay Page)

exec: pm.test('lastTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API step first'));
pm.test('txn id ready for SQL', () => pm.expect(id).to.be.ok);

`

Copy this SQL → Azure Data Studio (Platform DB)

` +

item.name: TC10. Validate that, a partial refund is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction
item.description:
AC-10 / Case 13589. Seed charge then POST /refund-transaction partial (wasVoided false).
**Expect:** 200 + refund transactionId.

item.name: POST process-card — seed for partial refund

request.description: Seeds refundOriginalTransactionId (amount 25.00).

item.name: POST refund-transaction — partial

request.description:
**Test case:** Validate that, a partial refund is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction.

**Expect:** HTTP 200 partial refund.

item.name: TC11. Validate that, the correct partial refund Amount and TransactionID is stored in the [Payments].[Refunds] table
item.description:
AC-11 / Case 13590. [Payments].[Refunds] Amount + TransactionId match partial refund.
Join via OriginalPaymentId → Payments where TransactionId = refundOriginalTransactionId.

item.name: SQL — Refunds (Send → Visualize → Platform)

request.description: Testmo AC-11. Send → Visualize → copy SQL → Platform.

body.raw:
SELECT r.Id, r.TransactionId, r.Amount, r.OrderId, r.OriginalPaymentId, r.TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Refunds] r
INNER JOIN [Payments].[Payments] p ON p.Id = r.OriginalPaymentId
WHERE p.TransactionId = '{{refundOriginalTransactionId}}'
ORDER BY r.TimeStamp DESC;
-- Expect Amount = 10.00 (partial)

exec: pm.test('refundOriginalTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API step first'));
pm.test('txn id ready for SQL', () => pm.expect(id).to.be.ok);

`

Copy this SQL → Azure Data Studio (Platform DB)

` +

item.name: TC12. Validate that, a void transaction (Full refund under the same day window) is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction
item.description:
AC-12 / Case 13591. Same-day void: refund-transaction full amount, wasVoided true.
**Expect:** 200 + void transactionId.

item.name: POST process-card — seed for void

request.description: Seeds voidOriginalTransactionId (amount 15.00) same day.

item.name: POST refund-transaction — void (wasVoided true)

request.description:
**Test case:** Validate that, a void transaction (Full refund under the same day window) is able to get successfully processed for CNP transaction.

**Expect:** HTTP 200 void / full same-day.

item.name: TC13. Validate that, the correct void amount and transactionID is stored in the [Payments].[Voids] table
item.description:
AC-13 / Case 13592. After same-day void, row in [Payments].[Voids].
**STAGE schema:** Voids has NO Amount column — assert TransactionId, OrderId, OriginalPaymentId, ResponseCode.

item.name: SQL — Voids (Send → Visualize → Platform)

request.description:
Testmo AC-13 (corrected). Send → Visualize → copy SQL → Platform.
Do not expect Amount on Voids.

body.raw:
SELECT v.Id, v.TransactionId, v.OrderId, v.OriginalPaymentId, v.ResponseCode, v.ResponseMessage, v.TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Voids] v
INNER JOIN [Payments].[Payments] p ON p.Id = v.OriginalPaymentId
WHERE p.TransactionId = '{{voidOriginalTransactionId}}'
ORDER BY v.TimeStamp DESC;
-- Expect void row (no Amount column on Voids)

exec: pm.test('voidOriginalTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API step first'));
pm.test('txn id ready for SQL', () => pm.expect(id).to.be.ok);

`

Copy this SQL → Azure Data Studio (Platform DB)

` +

item.name: TokenVault
item.description:
TokenVault — Testmo folder (13 cases).
Runnable without hardware: TC01–TC04, TC08–TC12.
CP (TC05–TC07, TC13): PARKED — needs QA lead / physical lane.

SQL checklist (Send → Visualize → Azure Data Studio):
| TC | Required / recommended SQL |
|----|----------------------------|
| 01 | Platform PTM=2 |
| 02 | Platform PTM=2 + TokenVault by GUID |
| 03 | Platform PTM=1 |
| 04 | Platform PTM=2 (+ TokenVault by ProcessorToken optional) |
| 05–07/13 | TokenVault by GUID (TC07); Platform PTM=5 / PTM=2 when CP runs |
| 08 | TokenVault by GUID |
| 09–11 | Platform by txn (PTM 2 or 1) |
| 12 | TokenVault by ProcessorToken (+ GUID / Platform) |

Correct DBs: Platform = [Payments].[Payments]; TokenVault = dbo.PaymentTokens (NOT Platform Payments.PaymentTokens).

item.name: 00. Auth — Payments + TokenVault scopes (run first in this module)
POST Authenticate Payment (STAGE)

request.description:
STAGE payments authenticate. Saves Payment-Bearer-Token (UnifiedPayments has TokenVault Read/Write).

Auth hardcoded STAGE: WellfitUnifiedPaymentsAPI. Select env **Regression STAGE** (URL + other vars).

item.name: TC01. Ensure CNP V1 endpoint is able to make a successful payment with processor token
item.description:
Case 167990. process-card with ProcessorToken → 200.
SQL (required): Platform [Payments].[Payments] PaymentTypeMethod = 2.

item.name: POST process-card — processor token

request.description: Use {{tokenVisa}} numeric ProcessorToken. No cvv/zip.

item.name: SQL — Platform Payments PaymentTypeMethod=2 (Send → Visualize)

request.description: DB **Platform**. Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2. Send → Visualize → copy.

body.raw:
SELECT Id, TransactionId, Amount, PaymentTypeMethod, OrderId, TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Payments]
WHERE TransactionId = '{{lastTransactionId}}';
-- Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2

exec: if (!id) { pm.test('id present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API first')); return; }

item.name: TC02. Ensure CNP V1 endpoint is able to make a successful payment with token GUID
item.description:
Case 167991. add-token → GUID → process-card with GUID.
SQL (required): Platform PaymentTypeMethod = 2.
SQL (confirm vault): TokenVault.dbo.PaymentTokens WHERE Id = GUID.

item.name: POST add-token — create Wellfit GUID

request.description: Creates TokenVault GUID from processorToken. Saves wellfitTokenGuid.

exec: const id = pt.id || pt.Id || j.id || j.Id || j.tokenId || j.TokenId;

item.name: GET get-token-details — confirm GUID

request.description: Confirm GUID resolves to processorToken.

item.name: POST process-card — Wellfit Token GUID

request.description: token = wellfitTokenGuid (UUID), not ProcessorToken.

item.name: SQL — Platform Payments PaymentTypeMethod=2 (Send → Visualize)

request.description: DB **Platform**. Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (CNP token / GUID). Send → Visualize → copy.

body.raw:
SELECT Id, TransactionId, Amount, PaymentTypeMethod, OrderId, TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Payments]
WHERE TransactionId = '{{lastTransactionId}}';
-- Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (CNP token / GUID)
-- DB dropdown: Platform

exec: if (!id) { pm.test('lastTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run charge request first')); return; }

pm.visualizer.set(`

Copy SQL → Azure Data Studio (Platform)

${sql}

Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (CNP token / GUID). Id: ${id}

`, {sql, id});

request.description: DB **TokenVault**. Confirm vault row for wellfitTokenGuid / cardToken.

WHERE Id = '{{wellfitTokenGuid}}';

exec: if (!id) { pm.test('wellfitTokenGuid present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run add-token / CP / V2 first')); return; }

Copy SQL → TokenVault DB

${sql}

Expect 1 row with Id = GUID. GUID: ${id}

`, {sql, id});

item.name: TC04. Ensure, Token is not saved into tokenvalut DB when CNP V1 endpoint runs with processor token
item.description:
Case 167992.
1) GET /query baseline → 2) process-card → 3) GET /query unchanged (API primary).
4) SQL Platform PaymentTypeMethod = 2 (required).
5) SQL TokenVault by ProcessorToken (optional / corroboration).

item.name: GET query — baseline by processorToken

request.description: Save baseline response text.

item.name: POST process-card — processor token

request.description: Charge with same processor token.

item.name: GET query — after charge (compare baseline)

request.description: Compare to baseline — expect no new vault write from V1 CNP.

exec: pm.test('No new vault persist from CNP V1 (body unchanged or still empty)', () => {
// Allow identical; if both empty/404-like, pass

item.name: SQL — Platform Payments PaymentTypeMethod=2 after CNP GUID (TC06) (Send → Visualize)

request.description: TC06: after process-card with CP cardToken GUID. DB Platform. Expect PaymentTypeMethod = 2.

body.raw:
SELECT Id, TransactionId, Amount, PaymentTypeMethod, OrderId, TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Payments]
WHERE TransactionId = '{{lastTransactionId}}';
